title: Installer resilience and UX for 0.3.1
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime installer failures stay inside installer-native handling and never fall through to CLI usage.
Repo sync retries primary source exactly 5 times with visible progress, then automatically tries configured fallback source and reports source selection in summary/JSON.
Windows shim execution normalizes broken npm/pnpm-style wrappers and returns structured installer errors instead of ENOENT crashes.
Installer state persists user-provided values across reruns and resumes Telegram-first onboarding without re-entering saved data.
TUI paste works for Telegram fields without breaking raw-mode navigation/editing.
Release metadata and proof bundle are updated for 0.3.1 with required repo verification.
